alpha_vs_comm_fraction.interpretation: Negative rho means high-alpha (CKA-type) sources have smaller communication subspace fraction — more selective communication.

alpha_vs_canon_corr.interpretation: Positive rho means high-alpha regions have stronger canonical correlations — more linearly predictable communication.

alpha_vs_comm_dimensionality.interpretation: Negative rho means high-alpha regions communicate through fewer significant dimensions.
